scripts.dev:web: /bin/zsh -lc 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then set -a && source .env.local >/dev/null 2>&1 && set +a; fi; npm run dev -w packages/web-app'
scripts.build:web: /bin/zsh -lc 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then set -a && source .env.local >/dev/null 2>&1 && set +a; fi; npm run build -w packages/web-app'
scripts.dev:portal: /bin/zsh -lc 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then set -a && source .env.local >/dev/null 2>&1 && set +a; fi; npm run dev -w packages/portal'
scripts.build:portal: /bin/zsh -lc 'if [ -f .env.local ]; then set -a && source .env.local >/dev/null 2>&1 && set +a; fi; npm run build -w packages/portal'
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose --env-file .env.local down -v && docker compose --env-file .env.local up -d
scripts.db:setup: /bin/zsh -lc 'npm run docker:up && set -a && source .env.local >/dev/null 2>&1 && set +a && if [ -d packages/web-app/prisma/migrations ] && find packages/web-app/prisma/migrations -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d | grep -q .; then npx prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/web-app/prisma/schema.prisma; else npm run -w packages/web-app db:migrate -- --name init; fi && npm run -w packages/web-app db:seed'
